activity.name: Determine Grid Expansion or Terrain Rotation-unknown
Determine Grid Expansion or Terrain Rotation-complete

template.description: Whenever activity Place Tile on Grid-start is executed, activity Place Tile on Grid-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Whenever activity Place Tile on Grid-complete is executed, activity UNKNOWN_EVENT-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Whenever activity Find Suitable Terrain-unknown is executed, activity Display Expansion Message-start has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.
